The BILD Awards are coming — here’s why they matter   Next week, the Building Industry and Land Development Association (BILD) will hold the 42nd annual BILD Awards. One of the largest awards programs of its kind in North America, the BILD Awards recognizes and celebrates excellence and innovation in the design, construction, marketing and sales of new homes in the Greater Toronto Area. When prospective home buyers see that a project they are considering has received a BILD Award, they should view it as a mark of distinction.
